message.content:
@startuml
participant ListingController as ListingController
participant FixPriceListingMapper as FixPriceListingMapper
participant Database as Database
participant allListings as allListings

doGet() -> ListingController
ListingController -> FixPriceListingMapper: readList()
FixPriceListingMapper -> Database: SELECT * FROM fixed_price_listing
Database -> FixPriceListingMapper: resultSet
FixPriceListingMapper -> allListings: create(title=resultSet.getString("title"), ...)
allListings -> ListingController: allListings

@enduml
